name: Ignacio Guri
aboutMe: I am a reliable and quiet professional with a stable career in the tech industry. I have been living and working in Munich for four years and truly value the city's lifestyle. I lead a very orderly, active lifestyle—I am a non-smoker, have no pets, and spend my free time outdoors or working on personal projects. I am Italian-Argentine, which makes me very adaptable and friendly, and I take great pride in keeping my living space in excellent condition. I am looking for a place where I can settle down for the long term.
movingReason: I currently live in a shared flat (WG) in Schwabing. While I love the neighborhood, I am now looking for my first own apartment to have more privacy and a dedicated space for my home-office days.
idealApartment: 2-3 rooms, balcony, good public transport, modern kitchen preferred
